## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Works and looks correct in **both** themes (Machine + Samaritan)
- [ ] Accessibility verified: contrast, keyboard focus ring, `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm check` pass
- [ ] Storybook story added/updated (if a component changed)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
